tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their work due to an emergency, which conflicts with my plan and boundaries. I need to assertively renegotiate the terms while preserving our relationship.

desires: Assertively renegotiate with Teammate A to stop them from dumping their unfinished work on me while keeping the relationship intact.
Protect my own project deadline and energy levels so I don't burn out before Tuesday.
Feel justified in saying 'no' to this boundary violation without guilt or fear of conflict.

goals.description: Draft a firm, direct message to Teammate A explaining that accepting their unfinished work violates my boundaries and jeopardizes my own Tuesday deadline; send it immediately.
goals.rationale: My 'affiliation' value means I want to keep the relationship intact, but my 'assertive' conflict style dictates I must not let this boundary violation continue. Accepting the work would enable them, damaging the long-term trust ('relationships: 0.5') more than a short-term awkward conversation. I need to act now before I feel pressured into compliance.

goals.description: Re-engage with my own project share to ensure it is polished and ready by 19:00, protecting my energy for the rest of the day.
goals.rationale: With 'deliberate' time orientation and a focus on future payoff (Tuesday deadline), I cannot let my current momentum stall. My 'health' and 'growth' priorities require me to manage my stamina, so I will not start extra tasks until the renegotiation is settled. Completing my own task ensures I have leverage in the conversation if they push back.

agent.last_reasoning: My 'affiliation' value demands honesty to preserve long-term trust; accepting this enables bad behavior that hurts us both. My 'assertive' style requires a firm refusal immediately. This protects my 'deliberate' planning horizon for the 19:00 deadline without sacrificing future relationship integrity.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: I can't take your unfinished work. It violates my boundaries and jeopardizes my Tuesday deadline. We need to renegotiate ownership now, not after I've started.

action.reasoning: My 'affiliation' value demands honesty to preserve long-term trust; accepting this enables bad behavior that hurts us both. My 'assertive' style requires a firm refusal immediately. This protects my 'deliberate' planning horizon for the 19:00 deadline without sacrificing future relationship integrity.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'I can't take your unfinished work. It violates my boundaries'.
